message:
Remove stale project directories during changelog sync

Add cleanup logic to syncChangelog() that removes project
directories no longer present in the news repository. This prevents
stale entries from accumulating indefinitely when projects are
removed upstream. The cleanup preserves index.mdx (git-tracked stub)
and timeline/ (regenerated separately).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
